adventures.title: A paradisiacal beach
adventures.desc: Cayo Jutías, one of Cuba's most beautiful destinations with direct car access, stands out for its white sands and crystal-clear waters bathed by the Caribbean sun. In addition to relaxing on its paradisiacal beaches, you can enjoy activities such as snorkeling and diving, exploring vibrant coral reefs and marine life. An ideal place for those seeking natural beauty and aquatic adventure.

imgs.alt: Aerial view of the paradisiacal beach of Cayo Jutías with turquoise waters and white sands in Cuba

adventures.title: An intense day
adventures.desc: Cayo Jutías, accessible by car, is one of the most spectacular beaches in Cuba, with white sands and crystal-clear waters bathed by the Caribbean sun. In addition to relaxing on its paradisiacal beaches, you can enjoy activities such as snorkeling and diving, and explore the Prehistory Mural and the El Fortín Canopy. The excursion also includes a visit to the Great Cave of Santo Tomás, one of the largest cave systems in Latin America and the Caribbean, offering a perfect combination of natural beauty, adventure, and cultural exploration.

imgs.alt: Fresh lobster tails grilling on a barbecue at Cayo Jutías beach with the turquoise Caribbean Sea in the background.
A person enjoying a zip line (canopy) tour through the dense tropical vegetation in Viñales.
The colorful Prehistory Mural painted on the side of a mogote in the lush Viñales Valley, Cuba.

adventures.title: Great Cave of Santo Tomás
adventures.desc: Discover the majestic Great Cave of Santo Tomás, one of the most impressive cave systems in Cuba and among the 10 largest in Latin America and the Caribbean. With approximately 45 km of galleries across seven levels, it offers a unique experience for nature and speleology lovers, featuring rock formations such as stalactites, stalagmites, and columns. Equipped with helmets and flashlights, hikers will explore this fascinating underground world surrounded by lush vegetation, living an unforgettable adventure in this marvel of the Cuban karst.

imgs.alt: A person standing on a wooden walkway inside the Santo Tomás cave, looking out towards the lush landscape of the Viñales valley, Cuba.

adventures.title: For all ages
adventures.desc: We offer an unforgettable horse-drawn carriage ride, ideal for seniors, people with disabilities, and children, allowing you to enjoy the stunning landscape of the Viñales valleys, famous for their natural beauty and rich peasant culture. During the tour, you will have the opportunity to interact with locals, learn about their traditions, and immerse yourself in the ancient tobacco culture of the region, all from the comfort and tranquility of a horse-drawn carriage, designed for your maximum comfort and enjoyment.

imgs.alt: Tourists enjoying a horse-drawn carriage ride through the rural trails of the Viñales Valley.

adventures.title: Viñales: day trip
adventures.desc: Make the most of your visit to Viñales with our day trip, an all-inclusive package that combines nature and culture. Travel by American car through the San Vicente Valley, visit the Indian Cave and the Palenque de los Cimarrones, enjoy views from Los Jazmines and explore the Prehistory Mural. Then, walk through La Penitencia Valley, see the tobacco plantations and return in a horse-drawn carriage. The experience includes lunch at Los Reyes and a horseback ride through the Palmarito Valley, with alternative options like cycling or visiting the Cow Cave.

imgs.alt: A classic blue American car driving along a reddish dirt road with the mogotes and vegetation of Viñales in the background.

adventures.title: History, culture, and nature
adventures.desc: Discover the history, culture, and nature of Viñales on a comprehensive tour that includes the Indian Cave, the Palenque de los Cimarrones, and the tobacco stripping, where you will learn about the making of the Cuban cigar. Admire the Prehistory Mural, enjoy panoramic views from the Palmarito and La Penitencia valleys, and from the terrace of Hotel Los Jazmines. The experience is completed with a visit to a tobacco farmer and a tour through the historic center of Viñales.

imgs.alt: Great Prehistory Mural painted on a mogote, representing historical evolution in the Viñales Valley.
